subcodes.first_line: Most men have remained deprived of the bounties of the All-Glorious One; perchance through divine grace the women shall arise to His Cause [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اکثری از رجال از شطر ذی الجلال محروم مانده اند از فضل الهی شاید نساء بر امرش
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @transcending the material condition, @role and station of women, @living waters; water of life, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @unity; oneness of humanity
